critical.mandate: Check web access availability before proceeding with research
If no web access, proceed with user-provided data and general knowledge only

step.title: Scope Definition
step.ask: What market or industry do you want to research?
Are there specific competitors you want analyzed?

step.title: Web Access Check
step.action: Check if MCP web tools are available for live research
step.check: Proceed with live web research in subsequent steps
Notify user: "Web access unavailable. Proceeding with user-provided data and general knowledge. Results may be less comprehensive."

step.title: Competitive Analysis
step.action: Identify and analyze competitors (direct and indirect)
For each competitor: strengths, weaknesses, market position, pricing model

step.title: Customer Research
step.action: Analyze user behavior patterns and needs
Identify underserved needs and market gaps

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate market research report with: executive summary, competitive analysis, customer segments, market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), key findings, and strategic recommendations.
